summary: Frontend-only e2e testing for DCX Security Systems site. All 7 routes load, navbar/mobile menu work, hero CTAs route to /contact, animated counters reach 1500+/300+/24x7/10+, 6 featured products render on Home, 12 products render on /products with working category filters (All=12, Sensor=5, Fire Safety=1), 6 service cards render, installations lightbox opens/closes, clients slider prev/next/dot work, contact form submits and shows success, contact tel/maps links correct, FAQ accordion expands, footer renders, floating WhatsApp/Call buttons have correct hrefs (wa.me/919971795961 and tel:+919971795961), mobile viewport works. No JS console errors observed.
critical_code_review_comments: Several PRODUCT_IMG entries reuse the same Unsplash URL (e.g., 'fire' and 'shutter' both use photo-1582139329536-e7284fece509). Consider unique imagery for visual differentiation.
EnquiryDialog.useEffect that depends on `product` mutates form.message even after user has typed — minor UX concern but not blocking.
App.js catch-all route (`path='*'`) renders Home instead of a dedicated 404 component. Acceptable for marketing site but a NotFound page is preferred.
seed_data_creation: None — frontend-only build with static data in /app/frontend/src/data/site.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 review-request features verified end-to-end via Playwright on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. The Contact form earlier appeared to fail when the radix Select dropdown overlay was left open before clicking submit; with Escape + scroll_into_view it submits cleanly, so this is a test-flow artifact, NOT an app bug. Mobile viewport (390x844) tested for Home -> mobile menu -> Products navigation. No backend exists; all forms are local-only (just setSubmitted(true)).
rca of the issue: No outstanding bugs found. Initial transient failure on /contact submit was caused by the Radix Select portal overlay intercepting the click; resolved by closing dropdown (Escape) before clicking submit — confirmed app behavior is correct.
